_registry_meta.coverage_note: Top-volume North American used-market backhoe loaders. All specs MEDIUM/manual_review unless OEM-confirmed. Schema expanded 2026-03-31: added listing-layer structured fields and feature_flags block.

patch_notes.description: OEM spec pass for 12 JD backhoe models. Patched 2 existing records (jd_310, jd_410l) with Tier 2 fields only. Added 11 new JD records: jd_310d, jd_310e, jd_310g, jd_310sg, jd_310sj, jd_310sk, jd_410j, jd_310l, jd_310l_ep, jd_310sl, jd_320p. All new Tier 2 fields (drive, transmission_type, rear_tire_size, front_tire_size) stored flat inside specs block — no tier2_specs block created. Skipped: rops_type, loader_bucket_width_in (next pass). Force fields null where not OEM confirmed.
audit_flags: jd_310 hp conflict — legacy placeholder shows 95 hp, OEM research shows 99 hp. New jd_310sl record is authoritative. Reconcile in future pass.

patch_notes.description: Added Caterpillar backhoe loader records from petersoncat.com, holtcat.com, and cat.com OEM PDFs. cat_420f flagged MEDIUM/manual_review (secondary source). cat_432 populated from OEM PDF including bucket dig force and reach; side-shift architecture retained.
audit_flags: cat_420f: all fields manual_review — secondary source only, no OEM specalog confirmed
cat_432: OEM PDF now supports bucket dig force and reach; do not revert to null
Duplicate protection enforced: existing slugs skipped with no overwrite

patch_notes.description: Replaced legacy cat_420f record in place with reviewed secondary-source version. All fields remain MEDIUM/manual_review. No other records changed.
audit_flags: cat_420f remains secondary-source only — no OEM specalog confirmed
all cat_420f fields remain manual_review
legacy cat_420f record overwritten in place by explicit exception

patch_notes.description: Added John Deere backhoe loader records across G, J, K, L, and P-Tier generations using OEM spec sheets and user-provided OEM screenshots. L-series standard operating weights locked where directly supported. jd_310l_ep operating_weight_lbs remains null pending direct OEM retrieval.
audit_flags: Weight standard enforced: standard operating weight only, not typical loaded weight
jd_310l_ep operating_weight_lbs left null by rule
Duplicate protection enforced: existing slugs skipped with no overwrite

patch_notes.description: Replaced pre-existing John Deere records in place to correct jd_pass1 weight errors, confidence state, and weak mixed-source values. No new records added. Legacy jd_310 retained unchanged as parser fallback.
audit_flags: Weight standard enforced: standard operating weight only
jd_310l_ep operating_weight_lbs intentionally null with LOW/manual_review
legacy jd_310 intentionally preserved and not updated

patch_notes.description: Case OEM cleanup pass. Added 6 model-specific Case records: case_580sn (S-boom standard), case_590sn (590 Super N), case_580sv (tool carrier / parallel-lift / center-pivot boom), case_580sn_wt (wide track - distinct from standard 580SN), case_575n_ep (DOC-only / no DEF / no DPF EP config), case_570sv (Asia Pacific Tier 3 - distinct from NA Tier 4 Final). Legacy fallback notes appended to case_580 and jd_310. cat_420f and cat_430f left unchanged (no new OEM specalog confirmed in this pass).
audit_flags: case_580sv: operating_weight_lbs, loader_breakout_force_lbf, max_reach_ft, backhoe_bucket_force_lbf left null - TC config architecturally distinct from 580SN
case_580sn_wt: operating_weight_lbs, tire sizes, travel_speed_mph left null - WT-specific deltas not OEM confirmed
case_575n_ep: all numeric specs null - DOC-only emissions confirmed; pending OEM specalog retrieval
case_570sv: all specs null - Asia Pacific / Tier 3 model, no NA OEM specalog confirmed
cat_420f: no change - secondary-source only, no OEM specalog confirmed
cat_430f: no change - no additional OEM source confirmed in this pass

patch_notes.description: Kubota compact TLB batch + New Holland B75D add pass. Added kubota_bx23s (sub-compact, BT603, Swift-Connect), kubota_b26 (compact, trunnion swing, HST 3-range), kubota_l47 (mid-size compact, HST Plus 6-range), new_holland_b75d (full-size, FPT engine, DOC-only T4F, CNH platform shared with Case 575N EP). Updated kubota_m62 in place: corrected max_dig_depth_ft 10.7->14.2, backhoe_bucket_force_lbf 4850->6572, hydraulic_flow_gpm 14.3->30.9, fuel_capacity_gal 15.9->17.7, travel_speed_mph 18.6->18, drive null->4WD, transmission_type null->HST Plus 6-range. All Kubota records carry compact TLB classification notes. new_holland_b95c explicitly skipped (non-NA market, no approved OEM source).
records_skipped: new_holland_b95c (non-NA market, South America / Middle East older-market machine — no approved OEM source)
audit_flags: kubota_bx23s: horsepower_hp=21.6 gross-only, MEDIUM/manual_review; operating_weight_lbs=2600 approximate TLB-config, MEDIUM/manual_review
kubota_l47: horsepower_hp=47.1 gross-only, MEDIUM/manual_review; operating_weight_lbs null (not OEM-confirmed); loader_bucket_capacity_yd3, loader_breakout_force_lbf, max_reach_ft null

kubota_m62: prior record had wrong dig depth, flow, bucket force — corrected to OEM values. loader_breakout_force_lbf, loader_bucket_capacity_yd3, max_reach_ft retained from prior source but downgraded to MEDIUM/manual_review
new_holland_b75d: loader_bucket_capacity_yd3, backhoe_bucket_force_lbf, loader_breakout_force_lbf, max_reach_ft null — not OEM-confirmed
All Kubota compact TLB records: downstream listing logic warned against presenting as peers to Case 580 / JD 310 / Cat 420 class machines
new_holland_b95c: NOT created — NA model not confirmed, regional market only

patch_notes.description: JCB OEM normalization pass. jcb_3cx replaced in place: corrected hp from 109->74 (EcoMAX engine, was incorrectly set to 4CX value), weight from 18960->16984, max_reach_ft from 19.5->17.5, drive populated, hydraulic_flow/force fields nulled per no-OEM-confirmation rule, architecture note corrected to center-mount-standard with sideshift-optional. Added jcb_4cx (109 hp, 4WS std, 16.3 ft dig), jcb_3cx14 (71 hp, NA-market, center-mount, 14.6 ft dig), jcb_1cxt (tracked, ~44 hp, skid steer front attach, not comparable to wheeled BHLs).
records_updated: jcb_3cx (full replacement — prior record had incorrect engine hp and architecture notes)
audit_flags: jcb_3cx: previous hp=109 was wrong (4CX engine value leaked in). Corrected to 74 hp.
jcb_3cx: previous architecture note said sideshift-only. Center-mount is standard; sideshift is optional.
jcb_4cx: backhoe_bucket_force_lbf, loader_breakout_force_lbf, hydraulic_flow_gpm, fuel_capacity_gal left null — not OEM confirmed
jcb_3cx14: same null fields as 4cx above
jcb_1cxt: loader_bucket_capacity_yd3 left null (compact TC bucket not comparable); tire sizes not applicable (tracked)
jcb_3cx_eco: NOT created per task rules
jcb_3dx: NOT created per task rules

Tier 4 Interim / EU Stage IIIB. Cat C4.4 ACERT engine.

transmission_type=HST Plus 6-range: OEM confirmed. drive=4WD: OEM confirmed.

source_refs: Cat 416 Specalog AEHQ8242 (petersoncat.com PDF)
notes: Tier 4 Final / Stage V. Cat C3.6 engine.

Travel speed 23 mph = PowerShuttle 4F std. PowerShift 4F optional adds 25 mph top speed.
Standard controls are mechanical two-lever; pilot joystick optional.

Pilot joystick controls standard. SAHR parking brake standard.

source_refs: Cat 420 XE Specalog AEHQ8244-04 (cat.com PDF, user-uploaded)
notes: Tier 4 Final / Stage V. Cat C3.6 engine. AWD standard.
420 XE is the premium IT-loader trim of the 420 platform. Distinct market identity from base cat_420.
KEY TRIM DIFFERENCES vs base 420: EH seat-mounted controls standard; EH Parallel Lift loader standard; Programmable Loader Kickout and Return to Dig standard; Hydraulic Lock Out standard.
Operating weight 16,279 lb is estimated operating weight from OEM PDF.
Core powertrain, hydraulics, dig depth, and tire specs are identical to base 420. Separation maintained for market identity reasons.
Do NOT merge with cat_420.

source_refs: Cat 432 Product Specs AEHQ8250 (cat.com PDF, user-uploaded)
notes: ARCHITECTURE: SIDE-SHIFT backhoe — NOT center-pivot. The backhoe boom slides laterally on a frame rail, enabling trench work flush to walls and curbs. Functionally distinct from all other backhoe_loader records in this registry.
EU Stage V emissions. C3.6 engine 92 hp net standard; optional higher-output engine available in OEM sheet.
Operating weight 8,322 kg = 18,347 lb from OEM spec sheet standard configuration.
Loader bucket capacity 1.03 m3 MP bucket from OEM spec sheet.
Loader breakout force 54,791 N = 12,318 lbf from OEM spec sheet.
Bucket dig force 63,447 N = 14,264 lbf from OEM spec sheet.
Reach from swing pivot at ground line 5,651 mm = 18.5 ft from OEM spec sheet.
Rear tire size 440/80-28 and front tire size 340/80-18 per OEM standard configuration note.
Machinery Trader listings for '432' in the US market are likely older 432D/432E side-shift units. This record covers current-gen 432.

specs.transmission_type: AutoShift 6F/3R std; AutoShift w/lock-up TC opt

Operating weight 21,544 lb is estimated config: OROPS, AWD, standard stick, 1.34 m3 GP bucket, 500 kg counterweight. Significantly heavier class than 420 series.
Loader bucket 1.75 yd3 (GP) vs 1.25 yd3 on 420 series — larger machine class.
Hydraulic flow 58 gpm — highest in Cat backhoe lineup. Handles heavier attachments.
backhoe_bucket_force_lbf 16,890 lbf — strongest in Cat center-pivot backhoe lineup.

notes: ARCHITECTURE WARNING: 580SV is a TOOL CARRIER (TC) / parallel-lift loader configuration.

source_refs: Case 575N EP product documentation (emissions architecture confirmed: DOC-only, no DEF)
notes: 575N EP: Economy Plus configuration - lower-cost derivative of the 575N platform.
EMISSIONS: DOC-only aftertreatment. No DEF (Diesel Exhaust Fluid), no DPF (Diesel Particulate Filter), no SCR.
EP designation = simplified Tier 4 Interim / Stage IIIB compliance path via DOC-only system.
Do NOT treat as equivalent to standard 580SN: different platform, different emissions architecture.
All numeric specs null pending direct OEM specalog confirmation - do not infer from 580SN.
All fields LOW/manual_review pending OEM spec sheet retrieval.

Sideshift backhoe optional depending on configuration.
horsepower_hp = 109: JCB EcoMAX Tier 4 Final (larger engine than 3CX).
operating_weight_lbs = 18988 lbs baseline; range ~19000-21000 depending on config.
max_reach_ft = ~19.4 ft baseline; varies by stick/configuration (~19-23 ft range).
backhoe_bucket_force_lbf, loader_breakout_force_lbf, hydraulic_flow_gpm, fuel_capacity_gal: null — not OEM confirmed in this pass.

operating_weight_lbs = 16191 lbs: lower end of confirmed range (16191-17101 lbs); use as baseline estimate.

source_refs: JCB 1CXT OEM spec sheet (compact tracked backhoe loader)
notes: ARCHITECTURE WARNING: tracked backhoe loader — NOT comparable to standard wheeled backhoes.
Drive = tracked: rubber track undercarriage. Travel speed ~4.6 mph reflects track ground speed.
Front attachment uses a skid steer style universal quick-attach system — accepts skid steer compatible attachments.
horsepower_hp = ~44 net: compact diesel engine, approximate value.
operating_weight_lbs = ~9400 lbs: approximate; well below standard wheeled BHL range.
max_dig_depth_ft = 8.3 ft: compact machine, significantly less than wheeled BHLs.
loader_bucket_capacity_yd3: null — small compact bucket not directly comparable to standard BHL loader capacity metric.
travel_speed_mph = ~4.6 mph: track speed, not road transport speed.
Do NOT compare or score against wheeled backhoe benchmarks.
backhoe_bucket_force_lbf, loader_breakout_force_lbf, hydraulic_flow_gpm, fuel_capacity_gal: null — not OEM confirmed in this pass.
